summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vitality Medication Reminder App. Backend APIs working at 94.4% success rate, frontend UI flows functioning well with minor session management issues.

integration_issues.issue: Users getting logged out frequently during navigation

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with Vitality branding
User registration flow (Patient and Caregiver roles)
Add medication form with all fields
Medication CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
Medications list display with proper styling
Dashboard shows stats and today's schedule
Emergency List page displays medications correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session management issue causing frequent logouts and investigate /api/medications/history endpoint returning 404 error
